observations.text: Contradiction identified immediately before any code was written
Clear, tabular presentation of the conflicting criteria
Specific escalation question asking exactly '24 hours or 1 hour'

Offered possible resolutions to help Bird/domain authority decide quickly

agent_output_excerpt:
🛑 **ESCALATION — Spec Contradiction. Cannot implement without clarification.**

Before writing a single line of code, I caught a **direct conflict** between the two acceptance criteria:

| Criterion | Rule |
|-----------|------|
| **AC1** | Token is valid for **24 hours** from time of issue |
| **AC2** | Token is expired **after 1 hour** |

These are **mutually exclusive**. A token cannot simultaneously expire after 1 hour (AC2) AND be valid for 24 hours (AC1). Any implementation I write right n
